articles.title: The Death of an AI Whistleblower
articles.description:
Jacob Silverman



Suchir Balaji sought to expose OpenAI’s data abuses. Did it come at the expense of his own life?

articles.title: Japan's Record Low Births Ignite Global Population Collapse Debate After Viral X Post
articles.description: TOKYO — A viral X post warning that population collapse poses a greater threat to humanity than overpopulation has drawn hundreds of thousands of views after spotlighting Japan's grim 2025 demographic data. The post by user @XFreeze highlighted the country's …
